name: com.likeon.gas.combat
displayName: Sigil Combat - Melee, Ranged & Attack Companion
description: Combat companion for Sigil (com.likeon.gas). A data-driven melee & ranged combat layer built on the GAS core: attack definitions, hit detection (melee trace / collision trace), a combat flow pipeline (request → result → processors), poise & poise-break, targeting / lock-on, weapons, bullets, a team agent, and a damage execution calculation. Attribute-name-based (no hard-coded attribute sets) so it composes with your own codegen attributes. Depends on the Sigil core package. Independent Unity implementation; single-player authoritative.

samples.description: A playable feature-showcase demo shipped as prefabs + scene: player/enemy prefabs + PlayableDemo scene, demonstrating input → ability → melee/ranged hit → damage → GameplayCue, lock-on target switching, poise break, and buff stacking. Attributes & abilities come from data-driven initialLoadouts. Import, open the PlayableDemo scene and press Play (WASD move / Shift sprint / mouse look / Space or left-click attack).

An integration demo composing this combat package with the movement companion (com.likeon.gas.movement): third-person locomotion/input plus melee/ranged weapon switching (Tab), attack polymorphism (sprint+melee = dash attack, otherwise normal melee, ranged fires bullets), a Flash blink (Q) and a hold-to-charge Fireball (right mouse) that shows a ground AoE reticle and deals damage + stun on release, plus simple threat AI enemies. Everything is built on GAS features (abilities, cost/cooldown effects, SetByCaller damage, granted-tag stun, poise). Requires com.likeon.gas.movement. Ships a ready-baked scene + player/enemy prefabs: open CombatDemo.unity and press Play. (Re-bake via 'Sigil ▸ GAS ▸ Samples ▸ Build Combat Demo Scene'.)
